title: Sanji Pushes Luffy Away
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Luffy, Unknown person #10, Judge, Reiju, Unknown person #11 as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji tries to protect the crew by rejecting Luffy, but Luffy refuses to accept a false goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Either way, it looks like there's nothing you guys can do from the out- side to help us escape...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So for now, please just... AGHHH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: nami, don't you worry! we are totally fi- AHHHHHHH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You two aren't convincing me in the slightest!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're heading over to the castle right now to look for Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright, if you manage to take him back, let us know!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's turned back into a normal mirror! I hope they really are okay...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He says he's human (but stuff like this really makes you wonder...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems like your luck hasn't run out yet.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An unidenti- fled object is headed straight towards us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It feels like it's been forever!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the... How did that kid manage to close all that distance so quickly?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what the hell is the deal with that huge ass tree behind him?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanjiii!! It looks like we made it just in the nick of time!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was so worried we wouldn't see each other again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I take it that's the infamous "Straw hat Luffy", huh.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm here to pick you up, Sanji !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hey, cut it out, you bastard !!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you trying to make this "Cat-Rriage" Topple over?!

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 44 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
